title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
###### **The particulars of any arrangement that exists for consultation with, or representation by, the members of the public in relation to the formulation of its policy or implementation thereof**
A system of monthly meeting between the branch heads, key staff and customers exists at the branch level to obtain customer feedback/consultation. Also, the Standing Committee on Customer Service has quarterly meetings, for which customers are invited to suggest improvements if any, in products, processes or policies.
